name: A Texas Breakfast Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9 inch Pyrex dish with the crescent rolls, ensuring to seal any perforations.
2. Cover the bottom of the dish with sausage, mushroom slices, and half the cheese.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the beaten eggs with the cream of onion soup.
4. Pour the egg and soup mixture evenly over the sausage and mushroom layer.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top of the casserole.
6. Cover the dish with foil or plastic wrap.
7. Chill in the refrigerator overnight.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Bake for 1 hour, or until the casserole is set and golden brown.
